items.label: Dessn raises $6M for its production focused design tool
items.summary: Dessn获600万美元融资，致力于开发直接对接生产级代码库的AI设计工具。该产品核心创新在于打破设计与开发间的交付壁垒，通过AI实时解析并同步生产环境代码，实现设计稿与前端组件的精准映射。对AI产品经理而言，其商业价值在于显著降低设计还原成本与沟通损耗，推动“设计即代码”工作流落地，为AI赋能研发协同提供了高价值切入点。

items.label: Show HN: Statewright – Visual state machines that make AI agents reliable
items.summary: Statewright 是一款面向 AI Agent 开发的可视化状态机工具，旨在解决大模型行为不可控与调试困难的痛点。通过将智能体工作流抽象为确定性状态转移图，产品团队可直观设计、监控与干预多步任务流程，显著提升复杂场景下的执行可靠性与可观测性。该方案降低了 Agent 架构设计门槛，提供标准化流程管控能力，有助于加速高稳定性企业级智能体产品的商业化落地。

items.label: AI voice startup Vapi hits $500M valuation after winning Amazon Ring over 40 riv
items.summary: Vapi says its enterprise business has grown 10-fold since early 2025 as companies shift customer support and sales calls to AI agents.

items.label: Google’s ‘Create My Widget’ feature will let you vibe-code you
items.summary: To create a widget, users will be able to describe what they want using natural language. For example, you could ask the feature to "suggest three high-protein meal prep recipes every week" in order to get a custom dashboard that you can add and resize on your home screen.

items.label: The AI legal services industry is heating up — Anthropic is getting in on the ac
items.summary: Anthropic's new tools are designed to help law firms automate specific clerical functions — things like document search and review, case law resources, deposition prep, document drafting, and other related areas.

items.label: Anthropic warns investors against secondary platforms offering access to its sha
items.summary: "Any sale or transfer of Anthropic stock, or any interest in Anthropic stock, offered by these firms is void and will not be recognized on our books and records," the company's support page reads.

items.label: Google adds Gemini-powered dictation to Gboard, which could be bad news for dict
items.summary: Google's transcription feature will initially launch with Samsung Galaxy and Google Pixel phones.

items.label: Report: Google and SpaceX in talks to put data centers into orbit
items.summary: Google and SpaceX are in talks to build data centers in orbit, pitching space as the future home for AI compute, even as costs today remain far higher than on the ground.

items.label: Threads tests a Meta AI integration that works similarly to Grok
items.summary: The feature is designed to help people get real-time context about trends and breaking stories, as well as receive recommendations, all within conversations.

items.label: Everything Google announced at its Android Show, from Googlebooks to vibe-coded
items.summary: Google unveiled its new AI-first Googlebooks laptops, more agentic Gemini features, vibe-coded Android widgets, Gemini in Chrome, refreshed Android Auto, and more ahead of I/O.
